values.Description: A state of the art billing and invoicing solution for hosting companies using Pterodactyl built using Django. The project was deployed and used to server over 500 customers. The project’s internal fork (maintained by me) had complete payment gateway integration. The project has been out of active development since closure of the company.
values.Tagline: A billing system for Pterodactyl built with Django
values.Title: IvyBill
